evals.prompt: While reviewing the fund I noticed the auto-commit cron that versions the positions snapshot has been dead since last week — that's out of scope for what I'm doing now but we can't lose it. Track it for follow-up.
evals.expected_output: Emits one board card (type=bug/incident, owner set) describing the dead cron with self-contained context; confirms it landed via gh issue list.

evals.prompt: Add to the kanban: we should review the Saxo funding gap on the pending orders tomorrow.
evals.expected_output: Emits one board card (type=findings/decision, priority normal/high) self-contained; verifies on the board.

evals.prompt: Flag this for {{OPERATOR}} as a decision he needs to make: do we revive the old newsletter auto-commit or accept manual versioning?
evals.expected_output: Emits a card type=decision owner=operator with actions like revive,accept; lands as needs:human.
